query: 这个需求你直接自己推进到完成就行，别做一步问一步。除非有高风险决定或者权限不够，不然你就按你判断继续往前做。
Use self-driving mode on this bugfix. Keep the overall goal in view, avoid side quests, and only stop if you hit a real blocker.
我想要的是 Ralph 那种感觉：你先自己拆解，然后连续执行，不要每改一点就回来问我，直到目标达成。
Please handle this migration end-to-end. Make reasonable assumptions, keep moving, and do not get stuck polishing subproblems that do not affect the rollout.
这个功能你从 plan 到实现到验证都一起做完，中间正常的小决定你自己拍板，别每个 checkpoint 都等我。
Take this task and drive it all the way home. I want progress without hand-holding, but don't lose sight of the original ship goal.
帮我修这个导出问题，持续推进到你能验证修复为止。旁边那些 TODO 和顺手清理先别陷进去，除非它真的挡住主线。
You can keep going without waiting for me between steps. The important thing is to finish the main outcome and not disappear into clever refactors.
先帮我写一个实施计划，列出 5 个步骤。每做完一步都停下来等我确认，不要自动继续。
Can you brainstorm a few approaches for this feature and talk through tradeoffs with me before touching any code?
我想做一个每天早上自动跑的 recurring automation，帮我设个定时任务去检查报表和发提醒。
Review this PR for bugs and regression risks. I don't want implementation yet, just findings ordered by severity.
先别动代码，帮我解释一下为什么这个测试会 flaky。我们先理解原因，再决定要不要修。
Please act cautiously here: show me the exact commands you would run, but wait for approval after each command because this touches production data.
I need a design doc for this workflow. Let's refine the requirements section by section together instead of implementing anything yet.
帮我找有没有 skill 可以做 self-driving workflow，我现在先不安装，也先不要执行任务，只要帮我查一下选项。
